title: Tempting Savory British Chicken Skillet
description: A salty and savory British dish made with chicken, featuring a chicken stock cube and rest meat, perfect for a midnight craving. This dairy-free friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until it is translucent.
Add the diced chicken to the skillet and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the diced rest meat to the skillet and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the chicken stock cube, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the diced potato and sliced carrot to the skillet and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer the mixture for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
